raw_consumer_statement: I have a Macys XXXX XXXX I can use anywhere. My card was being utilized for 2 days but I wasn't notified until day 2. These charges occurred on XX/XX/year> and XX/XX/year>. I disputed the charges thinking everything was fine until those charges kept getting back on my account and I paid {$2.00} fee that I thought was mine from those charges. Based on the investigation they held me accountable. Customer service has been giving me fraudulent information about the investigation every time I ask what steps were taken to investigate. After speaking to several people from customer service they reopened the case and then asked me to send them proof I was at work. They told me it would take 72 hours. Proof was sent on XX/XX/XXXX2. I was given the 26th date by customer service so I sent proof for the 25th and 26th not knowing it was actually the 26th and 27th when I verified myself. This whole investigation has been going on for 114 days including today. I sent a follow up email with no response. Im currently in home buying loan and it is affecting me tremendously.
